description_long: This doll is a stylized anthropomorphic yellow bird character with a rounded head, large green eyes, and a prominent orange beak. It features a white bib with colorful confetti patterns and the word 'LET'S EAT!!!' written on it, and its cheeks are highlighted with pink blush spots. The body is segmented with ball-jointed arms and legs, and the hands are outstretched with three fingers each. The doll wears a pink waistband and orange feet with three large, blocky toes. In one hand, it holds a small cupcake with eyes and a candle, adding a playful touch to its appearance.
description: A yellow bird-themed doll with a white bib, pink waistband, orange feet, and a cupcake accessory, featuring large green eyes and a cheerful expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, bib, outstretched arms, and the cupcake held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the beak, the bib's edge, and the cupcake's side details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, segmented limbs, and the waistband, with the cupcake visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the bib, and the back of the cupcake accessory.
attribute_clothing_style: White bib with colorful confetti print and 'LET'S EAT!!!' text, pink waistband, no additional garments.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs together, head facing forward, and right hand holding a cupcake.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with wide open green eyes, raised eyebrows, and pink blush on the cheeks, conveying a cheerful and inviting demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, smooth yellow feathers with three tufts on top of the head.
